title: Here's Why Momentum in Erie Indemnity (ERIE) Should Keep going
text: If you are looking for stocks that are well positioned to maintain their recent uptrend, Erie Indemnity (ERIE) could be a great choice. It is one of the several stocks that passed through our "Recent Price Strength" screen.

title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) Ups Dividend by 7.1% to Share More Profits
text: Erie Indemnity's (ERIE) recent dividend hike reflects its solid capital position and balance sheet strength that continue to support effective capital deployment.
